title: Scott Hepburn
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Scott}}
'''Scott Hepburn''' is a [[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] artist who has worked on several ''Star Wars'' comics.

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
===Interior art===
{{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Scott Hepburn}}

*[[Knights of the Old Republic 28|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 28]]
*''[[The Clone Wars 1]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars 4]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars 5]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars 6]]''
*[[The Clone Wars 7|''The Clone Wars'' 7]]
*[[The Clone Wars 8|''The Clone Wars'' 8]]
*[[The Clone Wars 9|''The Clone Wars'' 9]]

===Cover art===
*''[[The Clone Wars: Shipyards of Doom]]''
*''[[The Clone Wars 4]]''
*[[The Clone Wars 8|''The Clone Wars'' 8]] {{C|With [[Brad Anderson]]}}
